items.title: The Silent Struggle: Why Malaysia Must Wake Up To Rare Immune Disorders — Dr Zarina Thasneem Zainudeen & Dr Intan Juliana Hamid
items.summary: By integrating clinical expertise with genetic insights and expanded screening, Malaysia can ensure that every child’s genetic blueprint leads to a healthy future. The post The Silent Struggle: Why Malaysia Must Wake Up To Rare Immune Disorders — Dr Zarina Thasneem Zainudeen & Dr Intan Juliana Hamid appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Fifty Years Of Negotiations Across The Table For The Betterment Of Doctors’ Rice Bowl — Dr Sng Kim Hock
items.summary: It is always far better to talk and negotiate, and never to fight and threaten (picket, slow-down, strike) with our masters, because the “doctor can never be king ever again.” With that, I quietly retire from all the “talk across the table”. The post Fifty Years Of Negotiations Across The Table For The Betterment Of Doctors’ Rice Bowl — Dr Sng Kim Hock appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: ‘Zero Pending’, Zero Safety, Zero HCWs: The Burning Crisis At Queen Elizabeth Hospital — Health Worker
items.summary: To hit a 4-hour ETD clearance target at Queen Elizabeth Hospital, patients are pushed out of the emergency room and dumped into a multidisciplinary ward, regardless of their diagnosis or stability. Staff who try to delay unsafe admissions are threatened. The post ‘Zero Pending’, Zero Safety, Zero HCWs: The Burning Crisis At Queen Elizabeth Hospital — Health Worker appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysia Faces Emerging Shortage Of Dialysers, Haemodialysis Components
items.summary: Malaysia is facing an emerging shortage of dialysers (artificial kidney) and canister/bottle packaging for haemodialysis (HD) concentrate solution. A dialyser is necessary for HD. Nephrologists say kidney failure patients can't survive without dialysis. The post Malaysia Faces Emerging Shortage Of Dialysers, Haemodialysis Components appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Nutrition And Physical Activity: 80/20 Or 50/50? — Ahmad Zaki Mohd Rum & Dr Nor Aini Jamil
items.summary: Eating well may not be enough to support optimal health. Recent evidence points to a more balanced 50/50 approach, giving equal importance to good nutrition and an active lifestyle. The post Nutrition And Physical Activity: 80/20 Or 50/50? — Ahmad Zaki Mohd Rum & Dr Nor Aini Jamil appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Expedite Intake For Permanent Positions For Reserve Pharmacists, Dental Officers — Pharmacist
items.summary: We hope the authorities can expedite the intake for permanent positions for contract pharmacists and dentists and provide clarity on the status of those who are still waiting. Some 350 pharmacists are on the reserve list; validity ends on Oct 20, 2026. The post Expedite Intake For Permanent Positions For Reserve Pharmacists, Dental Officers — Pharmacist appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Beyond Chemo, New Blood Cancer Treatments Bring Hope In Malaysia
items.summary: A haematologist at Sunway Medical Centre, Sunway City, says stem cell transplant can be curative in many instances, while CAR-T cell therapy is lifesaving in Refractory B cell lymphoma, B cell Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia and multiple myeloma. The post Beyond Chemo, New Blood Cancer Treatments Bring Hope In Malaysia appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Nationalism Can Curb Doctor Brain Drain, Says KPPA
items.summary: Public Service DG Wan Ahmad Dahlan says doctor brain drain can be curbed if doctors have a "sense of nationalism to help the country", amid very low housemen intake. MMA says doctors leave because "the system and policy don't reciprocate their love." The post Nationalism Can Curb Doctor Brain Drain, Says KPPA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Dzulkefly: MOH Shifting To ‘Targeted’ Drug Stockpiling After Previous Covid Vaccine Wastage
items.summary: MOH is shifting to targeted, data-driven stockpiling after Covid-19 vaccine wastage, focusing on critical, fast-moving and single-source medicines, says Dr Dzul. MOH has set an April 15 deadline for pharma companies to report product availability levels. The post Dzulkefly: MOH Shifting To ‘Targeted’ Drug Stockpiling After Previous Covid Vaccine Wastage appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Why The Hormuz Crisis Could Become A Dialysis Crisis For Malaysia — Azrul Mohd Khalib
items.summary: Malaysia’s health care system is deeply dependent on plastic-based medical devices, consumables, and disposables. Naphtha, a vital petroleum derivative used in plastic manufacturing and petrochemicals, is essential for the production of these items. The post Why The Hormuz Crisis Could Become A Dialysis Crisis For Malaysia — Azrul Mohd Khalib appeared first on CodeBlue .
